body:
Hi Amara, I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) portfolio review. I've been thinking more about the two climate infrastructure companies you flagged — particularly the one working on grid-edge storage — and I think there's a really compelling angle around their data telemetry layer that could be worth digging into further. Given my work advising a few companies in that space, I'd love to set up a deeper session where we can map out where the real differentiation lies before your next investment committee meeting. Would you have 30-45 minutes sometime in the next two weeks? Happy to work around your schedule.

Best,
Hannah
